mapper.select: select id from subscribers where email = #{email}
mapper.insert: insert into subscribers (email, unsubscribe_token, active, status, confirmation_token) values (#{email}, #{unsubscribeToken}, true, 'ACTIVE', #{unsubscribeToken})
insert into subscribers (email, unsubscribe_token, active, status, confirmation_token) values (#{email}, #{unsubscribeToken}, false, 'PENDING', #{confirmationToken})
mapper.update: update subscribers set active = false, status = 'PENDING', unsubscribe_token = #{unsubscribeToken}, confirmation_token = #{confirmationToken}, confirmed_at = null, unsubscribed_at = null, bounced_at = null, deleted_at = null, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id}

update subscribers set active = true, status = 'ACTIVE', confirmed_at = coalesce(confirmed_at, current_timestamp), unsubscribed_at = null, bounced_at = null, deleted_at = null, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select id from subscribers where confirmation_token = #{token} and deleted_at is null
mapper.update: update subscribers set active = true, status = 'ACTIVE', confirmed_at = coalesce(confirmed_at, current_timestamp), unsubscribed_at = null, bounced_at = null, deleted_at = null, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select id from subscribers where unsubscribe_token = #{token} and deleted_at is null
mapper.update: update subscribers set active = false, status = 'UNSUBSCRIBED', unsubscribed_at = current_timestamp, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select count(*) from subscribers where deleted_at is null

select id, email, unsubscribe_token, active, status, confirmation_token, confirmed_at, unsubscribed_at, bounced_at, failure_count, last_delivery_status, last_delivery_error, last_delivery_at, created_at, updated_at from subscribers where deleted_at is null order by created_at desc, id desc limit #{limit} offset #{offset}
mapper.update: update subscribers set last_delivery_status = 'queued', last_delivery_error = null, last_delivery_at = current_timestamp, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id}

update subscribers set active = false, status = 'BOUNCED', bounced_at = current_timestamp, failure_count = failure_count + 1, last_delivery_status = 'failed', last_delivery_error = #{errorMessage}, last_delivery_at = current_timestamp, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id}
update subscribers set deleted_at = current_timestamp, active = false, status = 'UNSUBSCRIBED', updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select id, email, unsubscribe_token, active, status, confirmation_token, confirmed_at, unsubscribed_at, bounced_at, failure_count, last_delivery_status, last_delivery_error, last_delivery_at, created_at, updated_at from subscribers where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null
